data.body:
[Joint Firing Drill Preview]

11/1 (Tue) Joint Firing Drill - 'Defense Drill' will start soon!

The Defense Drill's goal is to defeat all the enemies that appear, so share your opinions with other senseis on which characters & skills to use!

https://discord.com/invite/bluearchiveglobal
#BlueArchive![s65DwNApG5iVtVe8FcqYxruaYWgV59dV.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/s65DwNApG5iVtVe8FcqYxruaYWgV59dV.jpg)

[Joint Firing Drill Schedule Change]

Joint Firing Drill: Defense Drill's schedule has changed. Please see below. Thank you for your understanding!

Period: After 11/15 (Tue) maintenance–11/21 (Mon) 18:59 (UCT)
